'''T-2H4''' was a silver [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] who wore an orange kerchief emblazoned with [[Raze (criminal)|Raze's]] sigil across one shoulder while in [[Wyl Tarson]]'s service on [[Per Lupelo]].

==Appearances==
*[[Rebellion 6|''Rebellion'' 6]] {{1st}}
